name: last30days-skill
description: Research any topic from the last 30 days across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Bluesky, Truth Social, Polymarket, and the web.

settings.name: ScrapeCreators API Key
settings.description: Biggest optional upgrade. Unlocks Reddit comments plus TikTok and Instagram.

settings.name: X Browser AUTH_TOKEN
settings.description: Optional manual X/Twitter cookie. Pair with CT0 if you are not using the setup flow.

settings.name: X Browser CT0
settings.description: Optional manual X/Twitter cookie. Pair with AUTH_TOKEN if you are not using the setup flow.

settings.name: Bluesky Handle
settings.description: Optional Bluesky handle, for example user.bsky.social.

settings.name: Bluesky App Password
settings.description: Optional Bluesky app password. Pair with BSKY_HANDLE.

settings.name: Brave API Key
settings.description: Optional native grounded web search with Brave.

settings.name: Serper API Key
settings.description: Optional native grounded web search fallback when Brave is not configured.

settings.name: Google API Key
settings.description: Optional Gemini planner and reranker. The skill still works for basic use without this.

settings.name: OpenAI API Key
settings.description: Optional OpenAI planner and reranker fallback.

settings.name: xAI API Key
settings.description: Optional xAI planner and reranker, plus Grok-based X search.

settings.name: Reasoning Provider
settings.description: Advanced override. Leave unset for automatic provider selection.

settings.name: Planner Model
settings.description: Advanced override for the planner model.

settings.name: Rerank Model
settings.description: Advanced override for the reranker model.

settings.name: X Search Backend
settings.description: Advanced override for X/Twitter search: xai or bird.
